description: Crispy crispy arbi jo masale mein lipti hui hai — roti ke saath ekdum mast lagti hai, aur haan, achhe se sukha lena varna chipchipi ho jaayegi!

steps.instruction: Arbi ko ubaal kar chhilka utaaro aur do tukdon mein kaat lo.
Kadhai mein tel garam karo, ajwain daalo, chatakne do.
Arbi daal kar tej aanch par golden aur crispy hone tak bhuno.
Haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch, amchur aur namak daal kar achhe se mila do.
Do minute aur bhuno taaki masala arbi par lipat jaaye. Garam serve karo!

description: Suran yaani jimikand ki tangy-teekhi sabzi — thodi imli ki khatai daal di toh gala bhi nahi khujata aur swaad bhi laajawab!

steps.instruction: Jimikand ko ubaal kar tukdon mein kaat lo.
Tel garam karke jeera aur pyaaz golden hone tak bhuno.
Haldi, lal mirch aur namak daalo, phir jimikand mila do.
Imli pulp daal kar dheemi aanch par 5 minute bhuno taaki khatai chadh jaaye.
Sukha hone tak pakao aur garam roti ke saath serve karo!

description: Veg ka 'non-veg' yaani kathal! Masaledaar aur thoda bhuna hua — banane mein thoda time lagta hai par har nivaale mein pyaar hota hai.

steps.instruction: Kathal ke tukdon ko halka sa ubaal kar nichod lo.
Tel garam karke jeera aur pyaaz golden hone tak bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun paste aur tamatar daal kar pakao jab tak tel chhode.
Haldi, lal mirch aur namak daalo, phir kathal mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 10 minute pakao, garam masala chhidko aur serve karo!

description: Sardi ki taazi sem ki phali, halki si bhuni aur lehsun ka tadka — simple par dil khush kar deti hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera aur kuta hua lehsun daal kar khushboo aane do.
Aloo daal kar 3 minute bhuno.
Sem ki phali, haldi, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 12 minute pakao, beech beech mein chalate raho.
Sem gal jaaye toh dhakkan hata kar sukha kar do. Garam serve karo!

description: Gawar phali halki kadwi hoti hai par sahi masale ke saath ye Rajasthani sukhi sabzi tiffin ki shaan ban jaati hai!

steps.instruction: Gawar phali ko halka sa ubaal lo taaki kadwapan kam ho.
Tel garam karke jeera aur hing daalo.
Gawar phali, haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 10 minute bhuno.
Amchur chhidko, ek-do minute aur bhuno aur serve karo!

description: Bihar ka favourite parwal, halka bhuna aur masaledaar — simple ghar ka khaana jo seedha dil tak pahunchta hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke panch phoran daalo, chatakne do.
Pyaaz daal kar golden hone tak bhuno.
Parwal, haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 12 minute pakao, beech beech mein chalate raho.
Parwal naram aur halka golden ho jaaye toh serve karo!

description: Patli patli kati kundru, crisp tak bhuni hui — chhoti si sabzi par swaad mein badi! Tiffin ke liye perfect.

steps.instruction: Kundru ko patla patla kaat lo.
Tel garam karke jeera daalo, chatakne do.
Kundru daal kar tej aanch par bhuno jab tak halki crisp ho.
Haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch, amchur aur namak daal kar mila do.
Do minute aur bhuno aur garam serve karo!

description: Halki phulki turai, apne hi paani mein pakti hui — pet ke liye bhi halki aur garmi mein ekdum aaram deti hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera aur pyaaz golden hone tak bhuno.
Tamatar, haldi, lal mirch aur namak daal kar gala lo.
Turai daal kar mila do, ye apna paani chhodegi.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 12 minute pakao jab tak naram ho.
Extra paani sukha kar garam serve karo!

description: Khushboodaar shimla mirch aur aloo ki jodi — jaldi ban jaati hai aur bacchon ko bhi pasand aati hai!

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera daalo, chatakne do.
Aloo daal kar dhak kar 8 minute pakao.
Shimla mirch, haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur namak daalo.
Tej aanch par 6 minute bhuno jab tak shimla mirch crisp-tender ho.
Amchur chhidko aur garam serve karo!

description: Cabbage aur matar ki halki sukhi sabzi — jaldi bane, low oil aur ekdum ghar wali feel deti hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera aur hari mirch daalo.
Matar daal kar 3 minute bhuno.
Patta gobhi, haldi, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 8 minute pakao, beech mein chalate raho.
Sukha hone tak bhuno aur garam serve karo!

description: Mooli aur uske patton ki sukhi sabzi — sardi mein garam garam paratha ke saath khao toh maza hi alag!

steps.instruction: Grated mooli ko nichod kar extra paani nikal do.
Tel garam karke jeera aur hing daalo.
Mooli aur patte daal kar haldi, lal mirch aur namak mila do.
Dheemi aanch par 12 minute bhuno jab tak paani sukh jaaye.
Halka golden hone tak pakao aur garam serve karo!

description: Karela kadwa par jab masale se bhar kar dheemi aanch par bhuna jaaye toh dadi-nani wala swaad aa jaata hai!

steps.instruction: Karela cheer kar beej nikaalo, namak laga kar 30 minute rakho phir dho lo.
Pyaaz ko thode tel mein bhun kar saunf, dhaniya, amchur, haldi, lal mirch aur namak mila kar masala banao.
Ye masala karelon mein bhar do aur dhaage se baandh do.
Tel garam karke karele rakh do, dhak kar dheemi aanch par har taraf golden hone tak pakao.
Dhaaga hata kar garam roti ke saath serve karo!

description: Jab fridge khaali ho aur bhookh tez ho — pyaaz tamatar ki ye jhatpat sabzi har ghar ki life-saver hai!

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera aur hari mirch daalo.
Pyaaz daal kar halka golden hone tak bhuno.
Tamatar, haldi, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 8 minute pakao jab tak masala gal jaaye.
Halka sukha kar ke garam serve karo!

description: Patli kati hari beans aur aloo, halki bhuni hui — tiffin ke liye perfect aur bacchon ko bhi pasand!

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke rai daalo, chatakne do.
Aloo daal kar 5 minute bhuno.
Beans, haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 10 minute pakao jab tak naram ho.
Halka sukha kar garam serve karo!

description: Khatti-meethi kaddu ki sabzi — poori ke saath toh ye jodi swarg jaisi lagti hai! UP ka classic combo.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke methi dana, jeera aur hing daalo.
Kaddu daal kar haldi, lal mirch aur namak mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 12 minute pakao jab tak gal jaaye.
Amchur aur gud daal kar halka mash kar do.
Do minute aur pakao aur poori ke saath serve karo!

description: Drumstick yaani sahjan ki halki bhuni sabzi — Bihar ki taqat wali dish jo body ke liye bhi bahut achhi hai!

steps.instruction: Sahjan ko ungli jaise tukdon mein kaat kar halka ubaal lo.
Tel garam karke panch phoran daalo, chatakne do.
Aloo daal kar 4 minute bhuno.
Sahjan, haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Dhaki hui dheemi aanch par 10 minute pakao aur garam serve karo!

description: Bhindi ko masale se bhar kar bhuna hua — har bite mein khatta-teekha masala bharaa hua, tiffin ki jaan!

steps.instruction: Besan ko sukha bhun lo, phir dhaniya, saunf, amchur, haldi, lal mirch aur namak mila kar masala banao.
Bhindi ko cheer kar ismein masala bhar do.
Tel garam karke bhari hui bhindi rakh do.
Dhak kar dheemi aanch par 12 minute pakao, beech mein palatte raho.
Halka crisp hone tak bhuno aur garam serve karo!

description: Protein se bharpoor soya chunks ki masaledaar sukhi sabzi — gym wale ho ya bacche, sabko pasand aati hai!

steps.instruction: Soya chunks ubaal kar nichod lo taaki paani nikal jaaye.
Tel garam karke jeera aur pyaaz golden hone tak bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun paste aur tamatar daal kar tel chhodne tak pakao.
Haldi, lal mirch, namak aur soya chunks daal kar mila do.
5 minute bhuno, garam masala chhidko aur serve karo!

description: Patli tariwali aloo tamatar — jab kuch jaldi chahiye toh ye rasedar sabzi roti, poori ya chawal sabke saath jamti hai!

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera aur hing daalo.
Tamatar puree daal kar haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur namak mila kar tel chhodne tak pakao.
Ubale aloo daal kar 2 minute bhuno.
Paani daal kar ubaal aane do, dheemi aanch par 10 minute pakao.
Garam masala chhidko aur garam serve karo!

description: Naram paneer aur meethi matar ek tariwale masale mein — guest aaye ya itwaar ho, ye sabki favourite gravy sabzi hai!

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke jeera daalo, phir pyaaz puree golden hone tak bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun paste aur tamatar puree daal kar tel chhodne tak pakao.
Haldi, lal mirch aur namak daal kar mila do.
Matar aur paani daal kar 8 minute pakao.
Paneer daal kar 4 minute pakao, garam masala chhidko aur serve karo!

description: Malai aur kaju ki rich gravy mein doobe paneer ke tukde — thoda shaahi, thoda romantic, guest dekhte hi wah-wah karenge!

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke pyaaz puree golden hone tak bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun paste aur tamatar puree daal kar tel chhodne tak pakao.
Kaju paste, lal mirch aur namak daal kar 3 minute bhuno.
Paani daal kar gravy ko ubaal lo, phir malai mila do.
Paneer daal kar 4 minute pakao, garam masala chhidko aur serve karo!

description: Chhote aloo masaledaar gravy mein dum par pake hue — har aloo masale se bhara, mehmaano ke saamne shaan badha deta hai!

steps.instruction: Ubale aloo ko kaante se halka chhed kar thode tel mein golden bhun lo.
Usi tel mein jeera aur pyaaz puree golden hone tak bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree daal kar tel chhodne tak pakao.
Aanch dheemi karke phenta dahi, haldi, lal mirch aur namak mila do.
Aloo daal kar dhak kar dum par 10 minute pakao, garam masala chhidko aur serve karo!

description: Lauki ke naram kofte tariwale masale mein — bachche bina jaane lauki kha jaate hain, mummy ki jeet pakki!

steps.instruction: Grated lauki nichod kar besan, thoda namak mila kar kofte banao aur halke tel mein golden seko.
Tel garam karke pyaaz puree golden hone tak bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar puree daal kar tel chhodne tak pakao.
Haldi, lal mirch, namak aur paani daal kar gravy ubaal lo.
Serve karte waqt kofte gravy mein daalo, garam masala chhidko aur turant serve karo!

description: Rajasthan ki shaan — besan ke gatte dahi wali tariwali gravy mein. Bina sabzi ke ghar mein bhi rajwaadi khaana ban jaata hai!

steps.instruction: Besan mein thoda tel, haldi aur namak mila kar atta gundh kar lambe rolls banao.
Rolls ko ubalte paani mein 8 minute pakao, nikaal kar tukdon mein kaat lo.
Tel garam karke jeera aur hing daalo, phir phenta dahi, haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur namak mila kar bhuno.
Paani daal kar gravy ubaal lo, phir gatte daal do.
Dheemi aanch par 8 minute pakao, garam masala chhidko aur serve karo!

description: Khatti dahi wali kadhi mein naram besan ke pakode — chawal ke saath toh ye pure pyaar wala combo hai, sunday special!

steps.instruction: Aadha besan mein thoda paani daal kar pakode ka ghol banao aur halke tel mein pakode tal lo.
Baaki besan, dahi, haldi, namak aur paani mila kar smooth ghol banao.
Tel garam karke methi, jeera aur hing ka tadka lagao.
Besan-dahi ka ghol daal kar lagatar chalate hue ubaal lo, phir dheemi aanch par 20 minute pakao.
Pakode daal kar 5 minute aur pakao, lal mirch ka tadka lagao aur serve karo!

description: Chatpati arbi jo ungliyaan chaatne pe majboor kar de. Halka sukha-tariwala, roti ke saath laajawaab.

steps.instruction: Ubli arbi ko halka daba kar tel mein crisp tal lo, alag rakho.
Usi tel mein jeera-ajwain tadka kar pisa tamatar daalo.
Adrak-lehsun, haldi, mirch, dhaniya daal kar tel chhodne tak bhuno.
Arbi, namak aur thoda paani daal kar dhak kar 5 minute pakao.
Amchur chhidak kar hara dhaniya se sajao, garam serve karo.

description: Protein ka tadka! Nutri ki nutritious gravy — bacchon ko bhi pasand aur sehat ko bhi.

steps.instruction: Soya chunks ko garam paani mein 10 minute bhigo kar nichod lo.
Tel mein jeera tadka kar pisa pyaz golden bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun aur pisa tamatar daal kar haldi-mirch ke saath bhuno.
Soya chunks, namak aur paani daal kar 8 minute pakao.
Garam masala milao, hara dhaniya daal kar chawal ke saath do.

description: Tariwali bhindi jo dum pe pakti hai — pyaz-tamatar ki gravy mein lipti, roti ke saath sona.

steps.instruction: Kati bhindi ko tel mein crisp tak fry karke nikal lo, lasdaar pan nikalne do.
Usi tel mein jeera tadka kar pyaz golden bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun, pisa tamatar, haldi-mirch-dhaniya daal kar tel chhodne tak bhuno.
Thoda paani aur namak daal kar gravy banao.
Tali bhindi daal kar dhak kar dum pe 4 minute pakao.
Amchur chhidak kar serve karo.

description: Sunday special anda curry — chatpati gravy mein ubla anda doob ke aata hai. Chawal ke saath ekdum mast.

steps.instruction: Uble ande chheel kar halki haldi-mirch laga kar tel mein halka fry karo.
Usi tel mein jeera tadka kar pisa pyaz golden bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun, pisa tamatar, haldi-mirch daal kar tel chhodne tak bhuno.
Paani aur namak daal kar gravy ubaalo.
Fry kiye ande daal kar 4 minute pakao, garam masala milao.
Hara dhaniya daal kar chawal ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Sabse jaldi banne wali dal — jab kuch samajh na aaye kya banao, yahi safe bet hai! 💛

steps.instruction: Masoor dal ko dho kar cooker mein haldi, namak aur paani ke saath 3 seeti laga lo.
Alag kadhai mein tel garam karke jeera tadka do.
Pyaaz golden karke adrak-lehsun aur tamatar daal kar bhuno.
Lal mirch daal kar masala tel chhodne tak bhuno, phir dal mein milao.
2 minute ubaal kar hara dhaniya daalo, chawal ya roti ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Pet halka rakhna hai? Yeh sookhi moong dal — har daana khila-khila, ghee ka tadka aur bas! 🌿

steps.instruction: Moong dal ko 15 minute bhigo kar paani nikaal do.
Kadhai mein ghee garam karke jeera, hing aur hari mirch ka tadka lagao.
Dal, haldi aur namak daal kar halka bhuno.
Naapa hua paani daal kar dhak do, dheemi aanch par daana khila-khila pakao.
Paani sookh jaaye to hara dhaniya daal kar serve karo.

description: Chilke wali moong — thodi rustic, thodi taakatwar. Bihari ghar ki seedhi-saadi daily dal.

steps.instruction: Chilka moong dal ko dho kar haldi-namak ke saath cooker mein 3 seeti laga lo.
Sarson tel garam karke jeera, sookhi lal mirch aur kuta lehsun golden karo.
Tamatar aur lal mirch powder daal kar gala lo.
Yeh chhaunk dal par daal kar 2 minute ubaalo.
Hara dhaniya daal kar chawal ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Rongi ki rasili sabzi-dal — protein se bhari, chawal ke saage khilao to plate saaf! 💪

steps.instruction: Lobia ko raat bhar bhigo kar cooker mein namak-paani ke saath 5-6 seeti laga lo.
Tel mein jeera tadka kar pisa pyaaz golden bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun aur pisa tamatar daal kar haldi-mirch-dhaniya ke saath tel chhodne tak bhuno.
Uble lobia apne paani sameth daal kar 8 minute pakao.
Garam masala milao, hara dhaniya daal kar serve karo.

description: Ashtami wale kale chane — taakat se bhare, ras-ras khaane mein maza. Halwa-poori ke saath jod toot ke!

steps.instruction: Kala chana raat bhar bhigo kar cooker mein namak ke saath 6-7 seeti laga lo.
Tel mein jeera tadka kar pyaaz golden bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar daal kar haldi-mirch-chana masala ke saath bhuno.
Uble chane apne paani sameth daal kar 8-10 minute ubaalo, ras gaadha karo.
Hara dhaniya daal kar poori ya chawal ke saath serve karo.

description: Khatti-meethi kadhi aur narm pakode — Punjab ki aatma. Garam chawal ke upar daalo, swarg yahi hai! 🧡

steps.instruction: Aadhe besan, pyaaz, namak aur thoda paani se gaadha mix banakar chote pakode tal lo.
Bache besan ko dahi aur paani mein achhe se gholo, gaanth na rahe.
Tel mein jeera, methi, sookhi mirch ka tadka laga kar haldi daalo.
Dahi-besan ghol daal kar lagataar chalate hue ubaal lao, phir dheemi aanch par 20 minute pakao.
Pakode daal kar 5 minute aur pakao, lal mirch chhidak kar chawal ke saath serve karo.

description: Ek hi handi mein dal bhi aur roti bhi! Rajasthani-style aata pattiyan dal mein ubli — one-pot pet-bhar khaana.

steps.instruction: Atte mein haldi, ajwain, namak aur thoda tel daal kar tight aata gundh lo, pattiyan kaat lo.
Arhar dal ko haldi-namak ke saath ubaal kar patli dal banao.
Tel mein jeera, sookhi mirch ka tadka kar tamatar aur lal mirch daalo.
Tadka dal mein milao, ubaal aane do.
Aata pattiyan ek-ek karke daal kar 12 minute pakao, beech mein chalate raho.
Gaadhi ho jaaye to hara dhaniya daal kar garam serve karo.

description: Pahadi gharon ki taakatwar gahat (kulthi) dal — sardi mein badan garam rakhe, swaad gehra-gehra.

steps.instruction: Gahat dal ko 4-5 ghante bhigo kar cooker mein namak-haldi ke saath 6-7 seeti laga lo.
Sarson tel garam karke jakhya/jeera aur kuta lehsun golden karo.
Pyaaz aur tamatar daal kar lal mirch ke saath bhuno.
Yeh masala dal mein milakar 10 minute ubaalo, gaadhi karo.
Hara dhaniya daal kar bhaat (chawal) ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Sookhi-bhuni chana dal — daana daana alag, lehsun ka chhaunk. Bihari thali ki shaan, roti ke saath kamaal.

steps.instruction: Chana dal ko 30 minute bhigo kar cooker mein haldi-namak ke saath 4 seeti laga lo, daana sabut rahe.
Sarson tel garam karke jeera, sookhi mirch aur lehsun golden karo.
Pyaaz daal kar bhuno, phir lal mirch daalo.
Ubli dal (paani nikaal kar) daal kar 6-7 minute sookha-bhuna karo.
Hara dhaniya daal kar roti ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Dal aur palak ka jhakaas jod — iron bhi, protein bhi. Bacchon ko palak chupke se khila do! 🌿

steps.instruction: Dal ko haldi-namak aur paani ke saath cooker mein 3 seeti laga lo.
Kata palak daal kar dal mein 4 minute ubaalo.
Ghee mein jeera aur kuta lehsun golden karo.
Tamatar aur lal mirch daal kar gala lo, phir dal mein chhaunk daalo.
2 minute ubaal kar garam-garam chawal ya roti ke saath serve karo.

description: Paanch dalon ka mela — har daana apna swaad laaye. Dhaba jaisi dal ghar pe, ghee ke tadke ke saath!

steps.instruction: Paanchon dal ko mila kar dho lo, cooker mein haldi-namak-paani ke saath 4 seeti laga lo.
Ghee mein jeera tadka kar pyaaz golden bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar daal kar lal mirch ke saath bhuno.
Tadka dal mein milao, 3 minute ubaalo.
Garam masala aur hara dhaniya daal kar chawal ke saath serve karo.

description: Garam-garam tamatar shorba — sardi-zukaam mein aaram, sip karte hi badan halka. Halki-phulki shuruaat.

steps.instruction: Tamatar, adrak, lehsun aur paani daal kar 10 minute ubaalo.
Thanda karke mathani/mixer se chaan lo, beej-chhilka alag karo.
Ghee mein jeera aur tej patta tadka karo.
Chana hua shorba, namak aur kali mirch daal kar ek ubaal lao.
Hara dhaniya daal kar garam-garam cup mein serve karo.

description: Hara-bhara palak shorba — iron se bhara, pet ko halka. Dinner se pehle ek garam cup, bas perfect!

steps.instruction: Palak, pyaaz, lehsun aur paani daal kar 6-7 minute ubaalo.
Thanda karke mixer mein peeskar smooth banao.
Makhan mein jeera tadka karo.
Palak puree, namak aur kali mirch daal kar 4 minute pakao, gaadha karo.
Garam cup mein daal kar upar se kali mirch chhidko.

description: Fridge ki saari sabziyon ka garam shorba — bachi sabzi ka jugaad bhi, sehat ka khazana bhi! 🍲

steps.instruction: Saari sabzi, tamatar, adrak aur paani daal kar 12 minute ubaalo.
Thanda karke mixer mein peeskar chaan lo.
Makhan mein jeera tadka karo.
Chana shorba, namak aur kali mirch daal kar 4 minute pakao.
Garam cup mein serve karo, chahe to nimbu ki boond daalo.

description: Dadi-naani wala kacche aam ka achaar — dhoop mein pakta, har thali ka chhota sa raja. Saalon chale!

steps.instruction: Aam ke tukde dho kar achhe se sukha lo, ek bhi boond paani na rahe.
Kuti saunf, methi, rai, haldi, lal mirch, hing aur namak mila lo.
Aam ke tukdon mein yeh masala achhe se lapeto.
Sarson tel garam karke thanda karo, achaar par daal kar mix karo.
Kaanch ke jaar mein bhar kar 4-5 din dhoop dikhao, roz hilao — achaar taiyaar.

description: Khatta-meetha-namkeen nimbu achaar — hazma bhi theek, swaad bhi. Khichdi ke saath toh jaan hai!

steps.instruction: Nimbu dho kar achhe se sukha lo, har ek ke 4-6 tukde kar lo.
Kala namak, safed namak, lal mirch, jeera aur kali mirch mila lo.
Nimbu tukdon mein masala aur gud milakar kaanch ke jaar mein bhar do.
Roz hilate hue 8-10 din dhoop dikhao, nimbu galne aur rang badalne tak.
Tayyar achaar ko thande jagah rakho, har khaane ke saath thoda nikaalo.

description: Teekhi-tamatari lehsun chutney — Rajasthani thali ka tadka. Baati, roti ya paratha ke saath aag laga de! 🔥

steps.instruction: Sookhi lal mirch ko garam paani mein 20 minute bhigo do, beej nikaal do.
Lehsun, bhigoyi mirch, jeera, amchur aur namak ko peeskar gaadha paste banao.
Sarson tel garam karo, halka thanda karke paste daalo.
Dheemi aanch par 5-6 minute bhuno jab tak tel alag na ho jaaye.
Thanda karke jaar mein bhar lo, baati ya paratha ke saath thoda-thoda lo.

description: Sardi ke hare choliye ki masaledar sabzi — Haryana ke kheton ki taazgi. Roti ke saath ekdum dhaasu! 🧡

steps.instruction: Tel mein jeera tadka kar pyaaz golden bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun aur tamatar daal kar haldi-mirch-dhaniya ke saath bhuno.
Hara choliya daal kar 2 minute masale mein bhuno.
Thoda paani aur namak daal kar dhak kar 12 minute galne tak pakao.
Hara dhaniya daal kar roti ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Indori barish ka favourite — kise hue bhutte ko doodh mein pakaya, upar nimbu-nariyal. Ek baar khaya to yaad rahega! 🌽

steps.instruction: Ghee mein rai, hing aur hari mirch ka tadka lagao.
Kisa bhutta, haldi aur namak daal kar 4-5 minute bhuno.
Doodh daal kar dheemi aanch par gaadha hone tak pakao.
Upar se nimbu nichod kar kisa nariyal aur hara dhaniya daalo.

description: Dilli ki gali-gali ka chatpata Ram ladoo — moong dal ke garam pakode, upar mooli aur teekhi chutney. Barish ho to maza dugna!

steps.instruction: Dono dal ko 3-4 ghante bhigo kar darkhdara peeso, hari mirch-hing mila do.
Batter ko phent kar halka karo taaki pakode phoole.
Garam tel mein chote-chote ladoo dheemi-medium aanch par golden talein.
Upar kisi mooli, chaat masala aur teekhi hari chutney daal kar turant khao.

description: Sarson ke saag ki saheli! Makki ka aata haath se thapthapa ke banao, makhan laga ke khao — Punjab ki shaan.

steps.instruction: Makki ke aate mein namak daal kar garam paani se narm aata gundh lo. Thoda chipchipa rahega, fikar mat karo.
Haath ko geela kar ke aate ki loi le lo aur do plastic ke beech rakh kar haath se thapthapa ke roti banao.
Garam tawe par dhyaan se daal do, makki ki roti naazuk hoti hai.
Dono taraf seko, halki si chitti aaye to samajh lo ho gayi.
Upar se makhan laga kar saag ke saath garam garam parosо.

description: Sardiyon ki taakat wali roti! Bajre ka aata garmi deta hai, ghee aur gud ke saath khao to maza dugna.

steps.instruction: Bajre ke aate mein namak daal kar garam paani se thoda thoda kar ke aata gundh lo.
Haath geela kar ke loi ko hatheli par hi thapthapa ke gol roti banao.
Garam tawe par halke haath se daal do, bajre ki roti todne wali hoti hai.
Dono taraf achhe se seko jab tak halke bhure chitte na aa jaayein.
Ghee laga kar gud ke saath sardi mein garam garam khao.

description: Halki phulki gluten-free roti! Jowar ka aata sehat ke liye badhiya, narm rahe to pet bhi khush.

steps.instruction: Jowar ke aate mein namak milao, garam paani daal kar narm aata gundh lo.
Geele haath se loi ko thapthapa ke ya plastic ke beech belan se patli roti banao.
Garam tawe par daal do, thoda paani chhidak do taaki sukhe na.
Palat kar dono taraf seko, chimte se aanch par phula lo.
Halka tel laga kar sabzi ya dal ke saath parosо.

description: Bihar ki jaan! Chatpata sattu ka bharwa paratha, achaar aur dahi ke saath — pet bhar jaaye dil na bhare.

steps.instruction: Aate mein namak daal kar narm aata gundh lo aur 15 minute dhak kar rakho.
Sattu mein barik pyaaz, hari mirch, ajwain, kala namak aur thoda sarson ka tel daal kar chatpata bhara taiyaar karo.
Loi le kar usmein sattu ka bhara bhar kar band kar do.
Halke haath se bel lo taaki bhara bahar na nikle.
Garam tawe par dono taraf tel laga kar kurkura sek lo.
Achaar aur dahi ke saath garam garam parosо.

description: Bihar ka raja! Sattu bhari gol litti aangithi par sek kar ghee mein dubo do — chokha ke saath swarg.

ingredients.name: Ajwain, kala namak aur achaar masala

steps.instruction: Aate mein namak aur thoda ghee daal kar thoda kara aata gundh lo, 15 minute rakho.
Sattu mein adrak-lehsun, hari mirch, ajwain, kala namak, achaar masala aur thoda sarson ka tel mila kar bhara banao.
Loi mein bhara bhar kar gol litti band kar do.
Oven ya gas tandoor mein 20 minute tak ghuma ghuma kar seko jab tak bhura na ho jaye.
Garam litti ko ghee mein dubo do.
Baingan-aloo chokha aur ghee ke saath parosо.

description: Sardi ki subah ka pyaar! Phool gobhi ka kasa hua masala bharo, ghee mein seko aur dahi ke saath chat kar jao.

steps.instruction: Aate mein namak daal kar narm aata gundh lo aur 15 minute rakho.
Kasi hui gobhi mein namak daal kar nichod lo taaki paani nikal jaye, phir masala mila do.
Loi mein gobhi ka bhara bhar kar band kar do.
Halke haath se bel lo, bhara bahar na aaye.
Garam tawe par ghee laga kar dono taraf sunehra sek lo.
Dahi aur achaar ke saath garam parosо.

description: Sardi mein mooli ka mausam! Kasi hui mooli ka teekha bhara paratha, makhan pighla ke khao — wah!

steps.instruction: Aate mein namak daal kar narm aata gundh lo, 15 minute dhak kar rakho.
Kasi hui mooli mein namak daal kar 10 minute rakho phir achhe se nichod lo, warna paratha geela ho jayega.
Mooli mein hari mirch, dhaniya, ajwain aur lal mirch mila do.
Loi mein bhara bhar kar band kar ke halke haath se bel lo.
Garam tawe par ghee laga kar dono taraf kurkura sek lo.
Makhan aur achaar ke saath garam parosо.

description: Bacchon ka favourite! Narm paneer ka masala bhara paratha, makhan ke saath — tiffin ho ya nashta, hit hai.

steps.instruction: Aate mein namak daal kar narm aata gundh lo aur 15 minute rakho.
Kasa hua paneer mein hari mirch, dhaniya, garam masala aur chaat masala mila do.
Loi mein paneer ka bhara bhar kar achhe se band kar do.
Halke haath se bel lo taaki paneer bahar na nikle.
Garam tawe par ghee laga kar dono taraf sunehra sek lo.
Dahi, achaar ya tomato ketchup ke saath parosо.

description: Bachi hui dal ka jugaad! Masaledaar chana dal ka bhara paratha — leftover ko shaandaar bana do.

steps.instruction: Aate mein namak daal kar narm aata gundh lo, 15 minute rakho.
Uboli chana dal ko mash kar ke pyaaz, hari mirch aur sukha masala mila do, geela na ho.
Loi mein dal ka bhara bhar kar band kar do.
Halke haath se bel lo.
Garam tawe par ghee laga kar dono taraf sek lo.
Dahi aur achaar ke saath parosо.

description: Jaldi banne wala chatpata paratha! Barik pyaaz aur masala bharo, garma garam chai ke saath udao.

steps.instruction: Aate mein namak daal kar narm aata gundh lo, 15 minute rakho.
Barik kate pyaaz mein hari mirch, dhaniya, lal mirch aur amchur mila do. Namak banate samay hi daalo warna paani chhodega.
Loi mein pyaaz ka bhara bhar kar band kar do.
Halke haath se bel lo.
Garam tawe par ghee laga kar dono taraf kurkura sek lo.
Dahi aur achaar ke saath garam parosо.

description: Ghar pe tawe wala naan! Maida-dahi ka narm aata, tawe par ulta laga ke phulao — dal makhani ki best dost.

steps.instruction: Maida mein namak, cheeni, baking soda, dahi aur thoda ghee daal kar narm aata gundh lo.
Gile kapde se dhak kar 2 ghante garam jagah par rakho taaki phool jaye.
Loi ko thoda mota bel lo, ek taraf paani laga do.
Paani wali side tawe par chipka do, dhak kar pakao.
Tawe ko ulta kar ke naan ko seedhi aanch par seko jab tak chitte na aayein.
Makhan laga kar dal makhani ya paneer ke saath parosо.

description: Safar ka saathi! Methi-masala wala patla thepla — 3-4 din chalta hai, achaar ke saath kabhi bhi khao.

ingredients.name: Haldi, lal mirch aur dhaniya powder

steps.instruction: Aate mein besan, methi, sab masale, namak aur dahi daal kar mila lo.
Thoda paani aur tel daal kar narm aata gundh lo.
Chhoti loi le kar patla patla bel lo.
Garam tawe par dono taraf thoda tel laga kar sek lo.
Achaar ya dahi ke saath garam ya thanda dono tarah parosо.

description: UP ki maa ke haath ki tehri! Aloo-sabzi wale masaledaar chawal, ek hi handi mein pet bhar khana.

ingredients.name: Haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur garam masala

steps.instruction: Chawal dho kar 20 minute bhigo do.
Kukar mein tel garam kar ke jeera aur tej patta chatkao, phir pyaaz bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun, tamatar aur masale daal kar tel chhodne tak bhuno.
Kati hui sabzi daal kar 3-4 minute bhuno.
Chawal aur paani daal do, namak milao aur dhak do.
2 seeti laga kar gas band kar do, bhaap apne aap nikalne do.
Dahi ya raita ke saath garam parosо.

description: Sardi ke taaze matar ka simple pulao! Khushboo wala basmati, jeera ka tadka — kisi bhi sabzi ke saath fit.

steps.instruction: Chawal dho kar 20 minute bhigo do.
Kukar mein ghee garam kar ke jeera, tej patta aur laung chatkao.
Pyaaz daal kar halka sunehra bhuno.
Matar aur garam masala daal kar 2 minute bhuno.
Chawal, paani aur namak daal kar 1 seeti laga lo.
Bhaap nikalne do, chawal ko halke se khol kar raita ke saath parosо.

description: Mili juli sabzi ka rang-birangi chawal! Ek hi handi mein poshan aur swaad — bacche bhi khush, badе bhi.

ingredients.name: Phool gobhi, gajar, matar aur beans
Haldi, dhaniya, lal mirch aur garam masala

steps.instruction: Chawal dho kar 20 minute bhigo do.
Kukar mein tel garam kar ke jeera aur tej patta chatkao, pyaaz bhuno.
Adrak-lehsun, tamatar aur masale daal kar tel chhodne tak bhuno.
Sari kati sabzi daal kar 4 minute bhuno.
Chawal, paani aur namak daal kar dhak do.
2 seeti laga kar bhaap apne aap nikalne do.
Dahi ya papad ke saath garam parosо.

description: Bachi hui chawal ka chatpata makeover! Pav bhaji masala wala tawa pulao — 10 minute mein nashta ya dinner.

ingredients.name: Pav bhaji masala aur lal mirch

steps.instruction: Tawe par tel ya makhan garam kar ke pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun bhuno.
Tamatar aur sari sabzi daal kar 4 minute pakao.
Pav bhaji masala aur lal mirch daal kar mila do.
Pake chawal aur namak daal kar achhe se mila kar 3 minute bhuno.
Nimbu nichod kar dhaniya daal do.
Dahi ya raita ke saath garam parosо.

description: Khatte tamatar wala tadka chawal! Jaldi ban jaaye, tiffin mein bhi mast lagе — simple par swaad bharpoor.

steps.instruction: Tel garam kar ke jeera, rai aur kadi patta chatkao.
Pyaaz daal kar halka bhuno.
Kati hui tamatar, haldi, lal mirch aur namak daal kar gala lo.
Pake chawal daal kar halke haath se mila do taaki toote na.
Dhak kar 2 minute bhaap mein rakho.
Dhaniya daal kar raita ke saath garam parosо.

description: Masaledaar ek-handi chawal! Sabzi aur khada masala ka mel — garam masala ki khushboo se ghar bhar jaaye.

steps.instruction: Chawal dho kar 20 minute bhigo do.
Kukar mein tel garam kar ke jeera, dalchini aur laung chatkao.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun daal kar bhuno.
Sabzi aur masale daal kar 4 minute bhuno.
Chawal, paani aur namak daal kar 2 seeti laga lo.
Bhaap nikalne do, dhaniya daal kar dahi ke saath parosо.

description: Protein wala bharpoor pulao! Safed chane aur masale ka mel — ek katori bhi pet bhar de.

steps.instruction: Kabuli chana raat bhar bhigo kar uba lo. Chawal alag se 20 minute bhigo do.
Kukar mein tel garam kar ke jeera, tej patta aur dalchini chatkao.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun daal kar sunehra bhuno.
Ubla chana aur masale daal kar 3 minute bhuno.
Chawal, paani aur namak daal kar 1 seeti laga lo.
Bhaap nikalne do, raita ke saath parosо.

description: Desi kale chane ka taakatwar pulao! Loha aur protein bharpoor — vrat ke baad ya normal din, dono mein hit.

ingredients.name: Dhaniya, lal mirch aur garam masala
Jeera, tej patta aur badi elaichi

steps.instruction: Kala chana raat bhar bhigo kar uba lo. Chawal alag 20 minute bhigo do.
Kukar mein tel garam kar ke jeera, tej patta aur badi elaichi chatkao.
Pyaaz aur adrak-lehsun daal kar bhuno.
Ubla kala chana aur masale daal kar 3 minute bhuno.
Chawal, paani aur namak daal kar 1 seeti laga lo.
Bhaap nikalne do, nimbu aur raita ke saath parosо.

description: Tyohaar ki khushboo! Ghee mein bhuna besan, cheeni aur elaichi — daadi ke haath ka swaad ghar pe banao.

steps.instruction: Kadhai mein ghee garam kar ke besan daal do.
Dheemi aanch par lagataar chalate hue besan ko bhuno jab tak sunehra aur khushboo na aaye.
Gas band kar ke thanda hone do, garam mein cheeni daalo to pighal jaayegi.
Halka garam besan mein boora aur elaichi powder mila do.
Kate dry fruits daal kar haath se gol ladoo baandh lo.
Thanda hone par dabba bhar kar rakho, 10 din chalega.

description: Kadah prasad wala atta halwa! Ghee mein bhuna gehu ka aata, deewana kar de khushboo — bhog ka raja.

steps.instruction: Ek bartan mein paani aur cheeni daal kar chashni garam karne rakho.
Kadhai mein ghee garam kar ke atta daal do.
Dheemi aanch par lagataar chalate hue atta bhuno jab tak sunehra aur khushboo na aaye.
Garam chashni dheere dheere daalo, chhinte se bachna, lagataar chalao.
Elaichi powder aur dry fruits daal kar gaadha hone tak pakao.
Garam garam prasad ya meethe ke roop mein parosо.

description: Shaadi-byaah ka shaahi halwa! Ghee mein bhuni moong dal, mehnat maange par swaad bemisaal — sardi ka maza.

steps.instruction: Moong dal ko 3 ghante bhigo kar darda pees lo.
Kadhai mein ghee garam kar ke pisi dal daal do.
Dheemi aanch par lagataar chalate hue dal bhuno jab tak sunehri aur dane dane na ho jaye.
Doodh aur paani mein cheeni-kesar ghol kar dheere dheere daalo, lagataar chalao.
Gaadha hone tak pakao, elaichi aur dry fruits daal do.
Garam garam parosо, upar se ghee aur badam.

description: Har khushi ki kheer! Doodh mein dheere dheere gala chawal, elaichi aur dry fruits — ghar ki sabse pyaari meethi.

steps.instruction: Chawal dho kar 20 minute bhigo do.
Bhaari tale wale bartan mein doodh ubaalne rakho.
Bhigоya chawal daal kar dheemi aanch par lagataar chalate hue pakao.
Jab chawal gal jaye aur doodh gaadha ho, cheeni daal do.
Elaichi powder aur dry fruits daal kar 3 minute aur pakao.
Garam ya thandi, dono tarah se parosо.

description: Rajasthan ka pyaar — dal baati ka saathi! Bati ko peeskar ghee-gud mila do, har nivaale mein mithaas.

steps.instruction: Aate mein 1 chammach ghee ka moyan daal kar kara aata gundh lo.
Loi ki moti tikiyaan bana kar dheemi aanch par sek lo ya bake kar lo.
Thandi hone par tikiyaan tod kar mixer mein darda pees lo.
Pisey churme mein gud ya boora aur elaichi powder mila do.
Bacha hua garam ghee aur dry fruits daal kar achhe se mila lo.
Dal-baati ke saath ya aise hi parosо.

description: Crispy bahar, naram andar! Chai ke saath ya chaat banake, dono mein hit hai ye desi tikki.

steps.instruction: Boiled aloo ko mash karke usme crumbled bread mila lo, isse tikki binegi nahi.
Hari mirch, lal mirch, dhaniya, amchur aur namak daal ke achhe se mix kar lo.
Haath geele karke chhoti chhoti gol tikki bana lo, halki si daba do.
Tawe par thoda tel garam karke tikki ko dheemi aanch par dono taraf seko.
Golden brown aur crispy hone tak palatte raho, jaldi mat karo.
Hari chutney aur imli chutney ke saath garam garam serve karo.

description: Protein se bhara halka nashta! Bina maida ke ye cheela pet bhi bharta hai aur sehat bhi banata hai.

steps.instruction: Bheegi moong dal ko thoda paani daal ke smooth batter mein pees lo.
Batter mein adrak, hari mirch, pyaz, dhaniya, haldi aur namak mila lo.
Tawa garam karke halka sa tel laga lo, ek karchhi batter daal ke phaila do.
Kinaron par tel daal ke dheemi aanch par seko jab tak neeche se crisp na ho.
Palat ke doosri taraf bhi golden hone tak seko.
Hari chutney ke saath garam serve karo, andar paneer bhi bhar sakte ho.

description: Subah ki jaldi mein banne wala light nashta! Roasted sevai aur sabziyon ka mazedaar mel.

steps.instruction: Sevai ko sookhe tawe par halka golden roast kar lo, alag rakh do.
Kadhai mein tel garam karke rai aur curry patta ka tadka lagao.
Pyaz daal ke halka sa bhuno, phir gajar aur matar daal do.
Sabzi naram hone par namak aur garam paani daal ke ubaal aane do.
Roasted sevai mila do, dhakkan laga ke dheemi aanch par pakao.
Jab paani sookh jaye aur sevai naram ho, hari dhaniya daal ke serve karo.

description: Naram naram bhalle thande dahi mein doobe hue! Tyohar ho ya mehmaan, ye chaat sabka dil jeet leti hai.

steps.instruction: Bheegi urad dal ko thoda paani daal ke fluffy batter pees lo, hawadar phento.
Garam tel mein chhote chhote bhalle daal ke golden tale, nikal lo.
Bhalle ko halke namak wale paani mein 10 minute bhigo do taaki naram ho jaye.
Bhalle ko halke se nichod ke plate mein lagao.
Upar se phenta hua thanda dahi daal do, achhe se cover karo.
Imli chutney, jeera, lal mirch aur chaat masala chhidak ke thanda serve karo.

description: Andey jaisa dikhe par hai pura veg! Jaldi ban jata hai aur roti ke saath laajawab lagta hai.

steps.instruction: Tel garam karke pyaz aur hari mirch ko halka golden bhuno.
Tamatar daal ke gala lo, haldi aur lal mirch mila do.
Masala tel chhodne lage to crumbled paneer daal do.
Namak aur garam masala daal ke 2-3 minute bhuno, zyada mat pakao warna paneer sakht ho jayega.
Hari dhaniya se garnish karke garam serve karo roti ya pav ke saath.

description: Sehat aur swaad dono ek saath! Ankurit moong ki ye chatpati chaat sham ki bhookh ke liye perfect hai.

steps.instruction: Moong sprouts ko 5 minute steam ya halka ubaal lo taaki kacche na rahe.
Ek bowl mein sprouts, pyaz, tamatar aur kheera daal do.
Nimbu ras, chaat masala, jeera powder aur namak daal do.
Achhe se mix kar lo, sab masale milne chahiye.
Hari dhaniya daal ke turant serve karo, taazi chaat sabse achhi lagti hai.

description: Bachi hui aloo sabzi ka best istemal! Tawe par crispy seki ye toast school tiffin ki jaan hai.

steps.instruction: Mashed aloo mein pyaz, hari mirch, haldi, lal mirch aur namak mila lo.
Bread slice ke ek taraf ye masala filling achhe se faila do.
Doosri bread slice se cover karke halke se daba do.
Tawe par thoda tel laga ke toast ko dheemi aanch par seko.
Dono taraf golden crispy hone tak palatte raho.
Tirchha kaat ke hari chutney ya ketchup ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Taazi sabziyon aur chutney ka thanda sandwich! Bina pakaye banta hai, garmi mein perfect.

steps.instruction: Bread slice par makkhan aur hari chutney achhe se laga do.
Ek slice par kheera, tamatar, aloo aur pyaz ki slices lagao.
Upar se chaat masala aur thoda namak chhidak do.
Doosri slice se cover karke halke se daba do.
Chahe to tawe ya toaster par crispy sek lo, warna aise hi kaat ke serve karo.

description: Dahi aur suji ka chatpata mix bread par! Bina ande ke crispy toast jo sabko pasand aata hai.

steps.instruction: Suji mein dahi aur thoda paani daal ke gaadha batter banao, 10 minute rakho.
Batter mein pyaz, shimla mirch, hari mirch aur namak mila do.
Bread slice par ye batter ek taraf motai se faila do.
Tawe par thoda tel laga ke batter wali side neeche karke seko.
Golden ho jaye to palat ke doosri taraf bhi crisp karo.
Hari chutney ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Khasta khasta chai ki saheli! Ek baar bana lo to hafton chalti hai, mehmaan aaye to kaam aati hai.

steps.instruction: Maida, suji, ajwain, kali mirch aur namak mila lo.
Garam ghee ka moyan daal ke achhe se mil lo, mutthi mein dabane par bandhna chahiye.
Thoda paani daal ke sakht aata gundh lo, 15 minute dhak ke rakho.
Chhoti loi lekar mota bel lo aur kaante se chhed kar do taaki phule na.
Bilkul dheemi aanch par golden aur khasta hone tak talo, jaldbazi mat karo.
Thanda hone par airtight dibbe mein bharo, chai ke saath maza lo.

description: Diwali ka pakka nashta! Crispy namkeen pare jo chai ke saath khaate jao, ruk hi nahi paoge.

steps.instruction: Maida mein ajwain aur namak mila lo.
Garam ghee daal ke moyan achhe se mil lo.
Paani daal ke sakht aata gundh lo, 15 minute rakho.
Mota roti bel ke chaaku se chhote chaukor ya diamond tukde kaat lo.
Dheemi aanch par golden aur crispy hone tak talo.
Thanda karke airtight dibbe mein bharo, hafton tak chalega.

description: Bachi sabziyon ko swadisht banane ka jaadu! Crispy cutlet jo sham ki chai ke saath kamaal lagti hai.

steps.instruction: Mashed aloo mein gajar, matar, hari mirch aur sabhi masale mila lo.
Thode bread crumbs mila do taaki mix bandh jaye.
Mixture ke oval ya tikki shape banao.
Har cutlet ko bread crumbs mein achhe se lapet lo.
Tawe par thode tel mein dono taraf golden crispy hone tak seko.
Hari chutney ya ketchup ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Vrat ka crispy treat! Bahar khasta, andar naram, moongphali ki crunch ke saath har niwala mazedaar.

steps.instruction: Raat bhar bheega sabudana mein mashed aloo aur kuti moongphali mila lo.
Hari mirch, adrak, jeera powder aur sendha namak daal ke achhe se mix karo.
Haath geele karke chhoti gol tikki bana lo.
Tel garam karke dheemi-madhyam aanch par vade dalo.
Golden aur crispy hone tak palatte raho, andar tak pak jaye.
Vrat wali moongphali chutney ya dahi ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Vrat mein meethe ka sabse pyaara saathi! Ghee mein bhuna singhare ka atta, har chammach taakat se bhara.

steps.instruction: Kadhai mein ghee garam karke singhare ka atta daal do.
Dheemi aanch par lagataar chalate hue golden aur khushboodaar hone tak bhuno.
Alag se paani aur cheeni garam karke chashni jaisa bana lo.
Bhune atte mein dheere dheere garam meetha paani daalo, gaanth na padne dena.
Elaichi powder daal ke gaadha hone tak pakao.
Kaju badam se garnish karke garam serve karo, vrat ka perfect meetha.

description: Vrat ka taakatwar mithai! Rajgira aur gud ke ye ladoo bina ghee ke bhi muh mein ghul jaate hain.

steps.instruction: Rajgira ko sookhe garam tawe par popcorn jaisa phulao, alag rakho.
Kadhai mein ghee aur thoda paani daal ke grated gud pighlao.
Gud ki chashni ek-taar jaisi gaadhi ho jaye to elaichi powder daalo.
Aanch band karke popped rajgira mila do, jaldi se mix karo.
Halka garam rehte hi haath par ghee laga ke gol ladoo baandh lo.
Thanda hone do taaki set ho jaye, phir dibbe mein bharo.

description: Vrat mein bhi pet bhar chawal ka maza! Halka phulka samak rice jeera tadke ke saath laajawab.

steps.instruction: Samak rice ko 2-3 baar paani se dho ke 10 minute bhigo do.
Kadhai mein ghee garam karke jeera aur hari mirch ka tadka lagao.
Chhana hua samak rice daal ke halka sa bhuno.
Garam paani aur sendha namak daal ke ubaal aane do.
Dhakkan laga ke dheemi aanch par paani sookhne tak pakao.
5 minute dum dekar khol lo, vrat wale aloo ya dahi ke saath serve karo.

description: Vrat ka rajsi meetha! Doodh mein bhune makhane aur dry fruits, ek katori taakat aur pyaar se bhari.

steps.instruction: Ghee mein makhane ko dheemi aanch par crispy hone tak bhuno.
Aadhe makhane ko hathon se thoda tod lo, baaki saabut rakho.
Doodh ko ubaal ke gaadha hone tak pakao.
Makhane daal ke 8-10 minute aur pakao jab tak naram na ho jaye.
Cheeni aur elaichi powder daal ke ghula lo.
Kaju badam se garnish karke garam ya thanda dono tarah serve karo.

description: Bina pyaz lehsun ki halki lauki! Vrat ke din pet ko aaram de aur swaad bhi de, dono ka kamaal.

steps.instruction: Ghee garam karke jeera, hari mirch aur adrak ka tadka lagao.
Cubed lauki daal ke halka sa bhuno.
Lal mirch aur sendha namak daal do.
Thoda paani daal ke dhakkan laga do.
Dheemi aanch par lauki gal jaane tak pakao.
Hari dhaniya daal ke samak chawal ya kuttu poori ke saath serve karo.

description: Khatti meethi kaddu ki sabzi! Vrat ke din ye sweet-tangy swaad muh mein paani le aati hai.

steps.instruction: Ghee garam karke jeera aur hari mirch ka tadka lagao.
Cubed kaddu daal ke 2 minute bhuno.
Lal mirch aur sendha namak daal ke mix karo.
Dhakkan laga ke dheemi aanch par kaddu gal jaane tak pakao.
Amchur aur gud daal ke mash karte hue 3-4 minute aur pakao.
Khatta-meetha balance dekh ke samak chawal ke saath serve karo.

description: Dahi ki thandak aur aloo ka swaad! Vrat ke din halki tari wali ye sabzi sabko bhaati hai.

steps.instruction: Ghee garam karke jeera aur hari mirch ka tadka lagao.
Aanch dheemi karke phenta hua dahi daalo, lagataar chalao taaki phate na.
Lal mirch, bhuna jeera aur sendha namak daal ke mix karo.
Cubed boiled aloo aur paani daal do.
Dheemi aanch par ubaal aane tak pakao, tari thodi gaadhi hone do.
Hari dhaniya daal ke samak chawal ya kuttu poori ke saath serve karo.

description: Vrat ka crispy pakoda! Kuttu atte mein lipte aloo, baarish ho ya vrat, chai ke saath kya baat hai.

steps.instruction: Kuttu atte mein hari mirch, jeera, lal mirch aur sendha namak mila lo.
Thoda thoda paani daal ke gaadha batter banao, gaanth na rahe.
Tel garam karo, halka dhuan aaye to aanch madhyam karo.
Aloo ki slice ko batter mein dubo ke garam tel mein dalo.
Golden aur crispy hone tak palatte raho, aloo andar tak pak jaye.
Vrat wali dahi ya moongphali chutney ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Crispy sukhi arbi vrat ke liye! Bina pyaz lehsun, jeera aur sendha namak mein bhuni, har niwala chatpata.

steps.instruction: Boiled arbi ko cheel ke beech se kaat lo ya halka daba do.
Tel garam karke jeera aur hari mirch ka tadka lagao.
Arbi daal ke madhyam aanch par crispy hone tak bhuno.
Lal mirch, sendha namak daal ke mix karo.
Amchur aur bhuna jeera daal ke 2-3 minute aur bhuno.
Crispy sukhi arbi ko samak chawal ya kuttu poori ke saath serve karo.

description: Vrat ki tawa-friendly tikki! Kam tel mein seki, crispy aur halki, vrat ke din sehat ka khayal.

steps.instruction: Bheega sabudana, mashed aloo aur kuti moongphali ek saath mila lo.
Hari mirch, bhuna jeera aur sendha namak daal ke achhe se mix karo.
Haath geele karke chhoti chapti tikki bana lo.
Tawe par thoda tel laga ke tikki ko dheemi aanch par rakho.
Dono taraf golden aur crispy hone tak seko.
Vrat wali dahi ke saath garam serve karo, kam tel mein bani sehatmand tikki.

description: Vrat ki phooli phooli puri! Rajgira atte ki ye puri vrat wale aloo ke saath swarg ka maza deti hai.

steps.instruction: Rajgira atte mein mashed aloo, sendha namak aur kali mirch mila lo.
Thoda paani daal ke naram aata gundh lo, zyada chipchipa na ho.
Chhoti loi lekar geele haath ya plastic par dabate hue moti puri banao.
Tel garam karke ek puri daal ke test karo.
Dheemi-madhyam aanch par dono taraf golden aur phooli hone tak talo.
Vrat wali aloo sabzi ya dahi ke saath garam serve karo.

description: Sardi ki shaam ka meetha! Shakarkandi ki natural mithas aur ghee ki khushboo, dil khush kar de.

steps.instruction: Boiled shakarkandi ko achhe se mash kar lo.
Kadhai mein ghee garam karke mashed shakarkandi daal ke bhuno.
Doodh daal ke gaadha hone tak lagataar chalao.
Cheeni daal ke ghulne tak pakao, mixture gaadha hone do.
Elaichi powder daal ke mix karo, ghee chhodne lage to taiyaar.
Kaju badam se garnish karke garam serve karo.

description: Lauki bhi mithai ban jaye! Doodh mein ghuli lauki ki ye kheer halki aur dil ko bha jaane wali hai.

steps.instruction: Lauki ko cheel ke baareek kaddukas kar lo.
Ghee mein grated lauki ko 4-5 minute bhuno taaki kacchapan jaye.
Doodh daal ke ubaal aane do, dheemi aanch par pakao.
Lauki naram aur doodh gaadha hone tak pakate raho.
Cheeni aur elaichi powder daal ke ghula lo.
Kaju badam se garnish karke garam ya thanda serve karo.
